title: Jobs+
description: Adds 10 jobs to Minecraft. You can now add your own jobs!
body:
[![Bisect Hosting Promotion Banner](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/ee9630c7-c981-45f9-9862-3a1d71a628bf.webp)](https://redirect.daqem.com?to=https%3A%2F%2Fbisecthosting.com%2FDAQEM%3Fr%3DJobsPlusRemasteredModrinth) [![Ko-fi Promotion Banner](https://i.imgur.com/SU7HhbO.png)](https://ko-fi.com/daqem)
Take your Minecraft experience to the next level with **Jobs+**! Choose from **10 unique jobs**, level up, earn rewards, and unlock **powerful power-ups** — all while customizing the mod to suit your gameplay style. ## Key Features ⚒️ **10 Unique Jobs:** Alchemist, Builder, Digger, Enchanter, Farmer, Fisherman, Hunter, Lumberjack, Miner, Smith. ⬆️ **Level Up to 100:** Gain experience by completing job-specific tasks and unlock recipes and rewards. 🪙 **Job Coins & Power-Ups:** Spend coins to unlock jobs and purchase unique power-ups for each role. 📋 **Full Customization:** Create custom jobs, recipes, and power-ups using datapacks. ## Getting Started 1. **Open the Jobs+ Menu:** Press **'J'** in-game to open the Jobs+ interface. 2. **Pick Your Job:** Choose your first two jobs and start completing tasks to earn job XP. 3. **Spend Job Coins:** Use coins to unlock new jobs and their power-ups. ## Showcase ## Customization Jobs+ is fully customizable! Use datapacks to create your own jobs, adjust rewards, and add unique features to your gameplay. --- ## Expansions | [](https://modrinth.com/mod/jobsplustools) | |----------| | [**Jobs+ Tools**](https://modrinth.com/mod/jobsplustools) | ## FAQ **Q: Does Jobs+ have any dependencies?** **A:** Yes, Jobs+ depends on the following mods: Knot, UI Lib, YAML Config, Arc Lib and Item Restrictions. **Q: How do I level up in a job?** **A:** Perform tasks related to your job, such as mining for a Miner or harvesting crops for a Farmer. Each task earns experience points. **Q: Can I create custom jobs?** **A:** Yes! Jobs+ supports datapacks, allowing you to design your own jobs, recipes, and power-ups. For examples no how the base jobs are made, take a look [here](https://github.com/DAQEM/JobsPlusRemastered/tree/1.21/common/src/main/resources/data/jobsplus). **Q: Is Jobs+ multiplayer compatible?** **A:** Absolutely! Players can work together to level up their levels even faster. Players will also get notified whenever you level up! **Q: How do I get started?** **A:** Simply press 'J' in-game to open the Jobs+ menu, pick a job, and begin your journey! **Q: The 'J' key doesn't work, what do I do?** **A:** There might be another mod that uses the 'J' key. Check your keykind settings and look for the 'Jobs+ Menu'. Make sure it is set to your preffered key and try again. ## Credits - [Crusenho Agus Hennihuno](https://crusenho.itch.io) ([UI Textures](https://crusenho.itch.io/complete-ui-book-styles-pack)) - [flowstate](https://www.youtube.com/@flowstatevideo) ([Showcase Video](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=bWg-82E14oQ&t=559s))
